title: Line 1: Italian Game - The Safe Way
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. d3 Nf6 5. O-O O-O 6. c3 d6 7. Bb3

goals.title: Start
goals.description: Claim the middle of the board with your pawn.

goals.title: Attack
goals.description: Develop the knight and attack the _enemy_ pawn.

goals.title: Aim
goals.description: Point your bishop at the weak f7 square.

goals.title: Solid
goals.description: Support your center and free your _other_ bishop.

goals.title: Safety
goals.description: Hide your king behind a wall of pawns.

goals.title: Support
goals.description: Prepare to build a strong _pawn_ center later.

goals.title: Tuck
goals.description: Move the bishop to safety before it is attacked.

title: Line 2: Italian Game - Fast Attack
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. c3 Nf6 5. d4 exd4 6. cxd4 Bb4+ 7. Bd2

goals.title: Prepare
goals.description: Get ready to challenge the _center_ with pawns.

goals.title: Strike
goals.description: Strike at the heart of the board immediately.

goals.title: Recapture
goals.description: Keep control by taking back with your _pawn_.

goals.title: Block
goals.description: Stop the check and offer a bishop trade.

title: Line 3: Evans Gambit - Power Sacrifice
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. b4 Bxb4 5. c3 Ba5 6. d4 exd4 7. O-O
description: Sacrifice a pawn for speed. Range: 1000+.

goals.title: Gambit
goals.description: Offer a _pawn_ to lure the bishop away.

goals.title: Tempo
goals.description: Attack the bishop and prepare the center.

goals.title: Center
goals.description: Take over the _middle_ while Black is busy.

goals.title: Castle
goals.description: Safety first while your attack starts brewing.

title: Line 4: Evans Gambit - Pressure Line
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. b4 Bxb4 5. c3 Ba5 6. d4 d6 7. Qb3
description: Pressure the weak f7 spot. Range: 1100+.

goals.title: Break
goals.description: Open lines for your pieces to _attack_.

goals.title: Battery
goals.description: Create a double attack on the f7 pawn.

title: Line 5: Italian Game - Two Knights Trap
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Nf6 4. Ng5 d5 5. exd5 Na5 6. Bb5+ c6 7. dxc6

goals.title: Classic
goals.description: Develop and look for a _weakness_ early.

goals.title: Jump
goals.description: The knight attacks f7 with the bishop.

goals.title: Take
goals.description: Grab the pawn and open the _diagonal_.

goals.title: Check
goals.description: Force Black to block and lose time.

goals.title: Greedy
goals.description: Keep the _material_ advantage while you can.

title: Line 6: Fried Liver - The Sac
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Nf6 4. Ng5 d5 5. exd5 Nxd5 6. Nxf7 Kxf7 7. Qf3+

goals.title: Sacrifice
goals.description: Kill the pawn and draw out the king.

goals.title: Double
goals.description: Check the king and attack the _knight_.

title: Line 7: Two Knights - Polerio Defense
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Nf6 4. Ng5 d5 5. exd5 Na5 6. d3 h6 7. Nf3

goals.title: Support
goals.description: Hold the center and keep your _bishop_.

goals.title: Retreat
goals.description: Move back after provoking a pawn move.

title: Line 8: Giuoco Piano - Greco Attack
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. c3 Nf6 5. d4 exd4 6. cxd4 Bb4+ 7. Nc3
description: Offer a pawn for development. Range: 1200+.

goals.title: Develop
goals.description: Bring out the knight and ignore the _check_.

title: Line 9: Giuoco Piano - Möller Attack
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. c3 Nf6 5. d4 exd4 6. cxd4 Bb4+ 7. Nc3 Nxe4 8. O-O Bxc3 9. d5

goals.title: Castle
goals.description: Get safe and prepare the king _rook_.

goals.title: Push
goals.description: Hit the knight and create massive chaos.

title: Line 10: Giuoco Pianissimo - Quiet Game
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. d3 Nf6 5. Nc3 d6 6. Bg5 h6 7. Bxf6

goals.title: Natural
goals.description: Develop your knight to a very _strong_ square.

goals.title: Pin
goals.description: Pin the knight to the enemy queen.

goals.title: Trade
goals.description: Remove the defender and mess up _pawns_.

title: Line 11: Max Lange Attack - Chaos Gambit
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Nf6 4. d4 exd4 5. O-O Bc5 6. e5 d5 7. exf6

goals.title: Explode
goals.description: Blow open the center of the board.

goals.title: Prep
goals.description: Get the king to a _safe_ spot.

goals.title: Advance
goals.description: Kick the knight away from its home.

goals.title: Capture
goals.description: Take the pawn and open the _king_.

title: Line 12: Deutz Gambit - Center Blast
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. O-O Nf6 5. d4 Bxd4 6. Nxd4 Nxd4 7. f4

goals.title: Ready
goals.description: Hide the king and prepare for _battle_.

goals.title: Sac
goals.description: Offer a pawn to open the center.

goals.title: Recoup
goals.description: Bring the knight to the _central_ square.

goals.title: Pressure
goals.description: Attack the center with your f-pawn now.

title: Line 13: Italian Game - Hungarian Defense
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Be7 4. d4 d6 5. d5 Nb8 6. Bd3 Nf6 7. c4

goals.title: Italian
goals.description: Place the bishop on its _best_ square.

goals.title: Occupy
goals.description: Take space while Black plays very defensively.

goals.title: Lock
goals.description: Trap the knight and gain _space_ advantage.

goals.title: Re-route
goals.description: Improve the bishop's position for later play.

goals.title: Clamp
goals.description: Secure the center with a _pawn_ wall.

title: Line 14: Four Knights Italian - Solid
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Nf6 4. Nc3 Bc5 5. d3 d6 6. O-O O-O 7. Bg5

goals.title: Complete
goals.description: Bring the last _knight_ out to play.

goals.title: Open
goals.description: Let your dark-square bishop enter the game.

goals.title: Castle
goals.description: Keep the _king_ safe from any threats.

goals.title: Aggressive
goals.description: Put pressure on the kingside knight immediately.

title: Line 15: Italian Game - Paris Defense
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 d6 4. d4 exd4 5. Nxd4 Nf6 6. Nc3 Be7 7. O-O

goals.title: Target
goals.description: Aim at f7 even if they _defend_.

goals.title: Expansion
goals.description: Claim the middle ground with your pawns.

goals.title: Recapture
goals.description: Keep the _knight_ active in the center.

goals.title: Reinforce
goals.description: Defend the e4 pawn and develop pieces.

goals.title: Finalize
goals.description: Complete your _opening_ development by castling.

title: Line 16: Two Knights - Steinitz Line
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Nf6 4. Ng5 d5 5. exd5 Na5 6. Bb5+ c6 7. dxc6 bxc6 8. Be2

goals.title: Safety
goals.description: Move the _bishop_ back to avoid trade.

title: Line 17: Italian Game - Scotch Transition

goals.title: Gambit
goals.description: Sacrifice a _pawn_ for quick attacking lines.

goals.title: Bait
goals.description: Offer another pawn to clear the path.

goals.title: Smash
goals.description: Remove the _protection_ from the enemy king.

goals.title: Fork
goals.description: Check the king and take the bishop.

title: Line 18: Giuoco Piano - Canal Attack
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. d3 Nf6 5. Nc3 d6 6. Bg5 h6 7. Bxf6 Qxf6 8. Nd5

goals.title: Removal
goals.description: Eliminate the _defender_ of the d5 square.

goals.title: Invasion
goals.description: Place the knight on a dominant square.

pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Nf6 4. Ng5 d5 5. exd5 Nxd5 6. d4 exd4 7. O-O

goals.title: Hammer
goals.description: Strike in the center with a _pawn_.

goals.title: Safety
goals.description: Castle quickly to bring the rook in.

title: Line 20: Italian Game - Modern d3
pgn: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Bc4 Bc5 4. O-O Nf6 5. d3 d6 6. c3 a6 7. a4
